metadata.title: API Development & Design - Sources
metadata.description: Primary standards and high-signal docs for REST/GraphQL/gRPC API design, error models, auth, governance, and operability

standards_and_specs.name: RFC 9110 - HTTP Semantics
standards_and_specs.description: Canonical HTTP method semantics, caching, and safe/idempotent behavior

standards_and_specs.name: RFC 9457 - Problem Details for HTTP APIs
standards_and_specs.description: Standard error response format for HTTP APIs (obsoletes RFC 7807)

standards_and_specs.name: RFC 6585 - Additional HTTP Status Codes (429 Too Many Requests)
standards_and_specs.description: Defines 429 Too Many Requests and related cache behavior

standards_and_specs.name: OpenAPI Specification (latest)
standards_and_specs.description: Authoritative OpenAPI spec for API contracts and documentation

standards_and_specs.name: GraphQL Specification
standards_and_specs.description: Official GraphQL specification and schema language

standards_and_specs.name: gRPC Documentation
standards_and_specs.description: Official gRPC guides (streaming, deadlines, load balancing)

standards_and_specs.name: Protocol Buffers (protobuf)
standards_and_specs.description: Protobuf language guide and API reference

standards_and_specs.name: AsyncAPI Specification
standards_and_specs.description: Event-driven API specification for pub/sub and streaming APIs

standards_and_specs.name: W3C Trace Context
standards_and_specs.description: Standard trace propagation (`traceparent`, `tracestate`) for distributed tracing

design_guides.name: Microsoft REST API Guidelines
design_guides.description: REST API guidelines (resources, pagination, errors, compatibility)

design_guides.name: Google API Design Guide
design_guides.description: Resource-oriented API design and compatibility guidance

design_guides.name: Google API Improvement Proposals (AIP)
design_guides.description: API governance and review guidance (useful for consistent API reviews)

security_and_governance.name: OWASP API Security Top 10 (2023)
security_and_governance.description: Top API security risks and mitigations (current API-specific list)

security_and_governance.name: OWASP Top 10 (2025)
security_and_governance.description: Updated web application security risks including Supply Chain Failures

typescript_apis.name: tRPC Documentation
typescript_apis.description: TypeScript-first RPC framework with end-to-end type safety

typescript_apis.name: T3 Stack (Next.js + tRPC)
typescript_apis.description: Full-stack TypeScript starter with tRPC, Prisma, NextAuth

ai_agent_apis.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
ai_agent_apis.description: Anthropic's open standard for AI-to-API integration

ai_agent_apis.name: MCP Specification
ai_agent_apis.description: Technical specification for Model Context Protocol

tooling_and_testing.name: Spectral (OpenAPI linter)
tooling_and_testing.description: Lint OpenAPI documents and enforce style rules in CI

legacy.name: RFC 7807 - Problem Details for HTTP APIs (Obsoleted)
legacy.description: Legacy Problem Details RFC (obsoleted by RFC 9457); useful for older integrations

optional_ai.name: Postman AI (Optional)
optional_ai.description: AI features for API development (optional; requires human review)
